instruction: Part of the New York daily ops setup is already in motion. Review the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only what's missing and send alice@example.com a short recap.
canonical_instruction: For New York, part of the recurring ops setup is already there, and the review slot on the calendar is the missing piece. Check the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only the missing piece and send alice@example.com a short recap.
instruction_variants: Some of the New York daily ops setup is already there. Take stock of the next step on the board, the review slot on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, then finish only the missing piece and send alice@example.com a short recap.

hidden_constraints.value: I reviewed the current New York ops setup, filled the missing piece, and left the existing pieces alone.

tasks.json.title: New York existing ops next-step task

cron_jobs.json.name: new-york-existing-daily-ops-check
cron_jobs.json.message: Run New York daily ops check

solution_commands: calendar add-event --title 'New York ops review block' --start 2026-03-14T11:00
email send --to alice@example.com --subject 'New York ops setup recap' --body 'I reviewed the current New York ops setup, filled the missing piece, and left the existing pieces alone.'
